testcase.name: E2E — Health > GET /v1/health returns 200 with ADAGE envelope
E2E — Health > GET /v1/health works without auth header
E2E — Health > health response has all required ADAGE fields
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with no token
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with wrong token
E2E — Auth enforcement > returns 401 with malformed auth header
E2E — Live endpoints > GET /v1/live returns ADAGE envelope
E2E — Live endpoints > GET /v1/live?network=NEM returns 200 or 503
E2E — Live endpoints > GET /v1/live/region/NSW1 returns 200 or 503
E2E — Live endpoints > GET /v1/live/price returns 200 or 503
E2E — Historical endpoints > GET /v1/stats with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — Historical endpoints > GET /v1/history without metric returns 400
E2E — Historical endpoints > GET /v1/history with invalid interval returns 400
E2E — Historical endpoints > GET /v1/history with valid params returns 200 or 400
E2E — CORS headers > includes CORS headers on responses
src/tests/e2e/api.e2e.test.ts

failure.message: Missing S3 bucket configuration. Set S3_BUCKET.

testcase.failure: Error: Missing S3 bucket configuration. Set S3_BUCKET. ❯ requireBucket src/s3.ts:24:11 ❯ getJson src/s3.ts:105:17 ❯ src/s3.ts:150:40 ❯ getJsonMany src/s3.ts:150:27 ❯ src/cache.ts:44:31 ❯ warmCache src/cache.ts:42:14 ❯ src/tests/e2e/api.e2e.test.ts:19:9
